3222210.name: The Lost Robot
3222210.description:
The Lost Robot - For unknown reasons, you found yourself on a planet unknown to your race. To get out, you need to collect space parts and mechanical ore. On your way, you will encounter various dangers: Starting from local enemies, ending with incomprehensible labyrinths! But you need to do everything possible to return home and repair your ship!

The game is a 2D platformer with puzzle elements: Collect various resources on the levels, destroy enemies and move on through the story.

Defeat the dangerous creatures inhabiting this planet, using your skill and weapons.
Get ready for an exciting adventure!
